name: Busca Ativa - Chat Conversacional (Fase 1: Confirmacao Empatica)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "response_id": "{{ $node[\"Webhook Chat\"].json.response_id || null }}",
  "student_id": "{{ $node[\"Webhook Chat\"].json.student_id || null }}",
  "prompt_version": "{{ $json.prompt_version }}",
  "model": "{{ $json.model }}",
  "input_text": "{{ $node[\"GET Session Context\"].json.messages ? $node[\"GET Session Context\"].json.messages.map(m => m.sender + ': ' + m.text).join('\\n') : '' }}",
  "output_text": "{{ $json.response_text }}",
  "classified_reason": "{{ $json.classified_reason || null }}",
  "risk_level": "{{ $json.risk_level || null }}",
  "tokens_input": {{ $node[\"OpenAI Chat\"].json.usage.prompt_tokens || 0 }},
  "tokens_output": {{ $node[\"OpenAI Chat\"].json.usage.completion_tokens || 0 }},
  "cost": {{ ($node[\"OpenAI Chat\"].json.usage.prompt_tokens || 0) * 0.00000015 + ($node[\"OpenAI Chat\"].json.usage.completion_tokens || 0) * 0.0000006 }}
}
